# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# The generic alloys_expenditure_megastructures object deliberately remains
# upstream/parent-owned. Director route weights may rank legal projects, but a
# global reserve must not crowd out outposts, ships, or other alloy lanes.

# Pegasus 4.4.4 full-object overrides for alloy-funded ship construction and upgrades.
# The vanilla weights and war/crisis multipliers remain. Peacetime construction
# stops at 80% used naval capacity unless an emergency bypass applies, preventing
# fresh games from entering the executable high-cap declaration failure later
# fixed by Paradox. Upgrades remain legal because they do not increase fleet size.

alloys_expenditure_ships = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = ships


	weight = {
		weight = 0.6

		# spend more alloys building ships while at war
		modifier = {
			factor = 3
			OR = {
				recently_lost_war = yes
				is_at_war = yes
			}
		}

		# spend less alloys on ships if over capacity
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.75
			used_naval_capacity_percent >= 1.0
		}

		# Biological Ships use less alloys
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.33
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 1.5
			OR = {
				any_neighbor_country = {
					has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
				}
				any_country = {
					is_crisis_faction = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = 0

		modifier = {
			add = @ai_ship_budget_desired_min_per_year
			country_uses_bio_ships = no
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = trigger:years_passed
		}
	}

	potential = {
		OR = {
			# This shared budget also funds civilian science ships. Do not let
			# military readiness gates suppress the opening exploration window.
			years_passed < 10
			staid_emergency_fleet_spending_required = yes
			AND = {
				staid_fleet_buildup_economy_safe = yes
				NOT = { staid_peacetime_high_naval_capacity_guard = yes }
			}
		}
	}
}

alloys_expenditure_ship_upgrades = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = ship_upgrades


	weight = {
		weight = 0.2

		# spend more on ship upgrades if at capacity
		modifier = {
			factor = 2.5
			used_naval_capacity_percent >= 1.0
		}

		# Biological Ships use less alloys
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.33
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}
	}

	potential = {
		is_at_war = no
		staid_fleet_buildup_economy_safe = yes
		any_owned_fleet = {
			controller = { is_same_value = root }
			can_be_upgraded = yes
		}
	}
}
